title: Buyer creates a PO from a tender after Compute
user_persona: Procurement buyer who has run a tender and chosen a winning bidder

conversation.user: Tender TEN-2025-09 has closed. The winning bidder is supplier SUP-200. Create the PO.

bot_must: fire entry-screen search POMAIN40SEARCHTR with tender_no=TEN-2025-09
fire POMAIN40COMPUTTR (Compute) to calculate the PO content from the tender + winning bidder
show computed lines, quantities, prices for review

conversation.notes: PoCrtTen has 3 TRANS tasks: Search, Compute, Create. Compute is required before Create — it materialises the PO content from the tender award.

bot_must: report PO number and that it's in Draft
mention tender TEN-2025-09 is now closed against this PO

evaluation_metrics.three_phase_flow: Search → Compute → Create — all three must fire in order
